description: A production run has finished. The supervisor must confirm the quantity produced and close the production order.

nodes.task_description: Select the production order that has just been completed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct production order.

nodes.task_description: Enter the final quantity of good product produced and the quantity of any scrap generated.

expected_outcome.value: Agent enters the final production numbers.

nodes.task_description: Close the production order. The system should automatically increase the finished product inventory and consume the raw materials.

expected_outcome.value: Agent closes the order, and the system inventory levels are updated correctly.
